userText: How do I set up a Postgres container with docker-compose?
assistantText: Add a postgres:16 service to docker-compose.yml, set POSTGRES_PASSWORD, map port 5432, and add a named volume pgdata mounted at /var/lib/postgresql/data so the data survives restarts.

userText: What URL does the squirl Chroma client default to?
assistantText: When chromaUrl is unset it defaults to http://localhost:8000, and the default collection is squirl-messages.

userText: Which embedding model does the OpenAI embedder use by default and how many dimensions?
assistantText: The OpenAI embedder defaults to text-embedding-3-small with 1536 dimensions.

userText: How do I run embeddings locally instead of OpenAI?
assistantText: Use the local embedder backed by Ollama with nomic-embed-text (768 dims), pointing embedderUrl at the Ollama server's /api/embed endpoint.

userText: How can I work on two branches at the same time without stashing?
assistantText: Use git worktree add ../feature-x feature-x to check out a second branch into a separate directory, so each branch has its own working tree.

userText: How do I combine several commits into a single commit?
assistantText: Run git rebase -i HEAD~N and mark the later commits as squash (or fixup) to fold them into the first, then edit the combined message.

userText: Why do my TypeScript imports need .js extensions?
assistantText: Because the project uses ESM with NodeNext module resolution; relative imports must use the emitted .js extension even though the source files are .ts.

userText: How do I run a TypeScript file without compiling it first?
assistantText: Use tsx, e.g. tsx src/index.ts, which runs TypeScript directly without a separate tsc build step.

userText: What's the difference between the test scripts?
assistantText: npm run test runs vitest run for a single pass, while npm run test:watch runs vitest in watch mode that reruns on file changes.

userText: My Ink terminal UI keeps flickering, how do I fix it?
assistantText: Wrap completed output in Ink's <Static> component so it isn't redrawn every render, and avoid height='100%' which forces full-region repaints.

userText: Backspace isn't registering in my Ink input on macOS.
assistantText: macOS Backspace sends 0x7f, which Ink maps to key.delete rather than key.backspace, so handle key.delete to catch backspace presses.

userText: How do I use SSH keys stored in 1Password?
assistantText: Enable the 1Password SSH agent and reference keys by item name; the private key stays in 1Password and the public key goes into authorized_keys on the host.

userText: How do I make an isolated Python environment?
assistantText: Create a virtual environment with python -m venv .venv, then activate it with source .venv/bin/activate so dependencies stay project-local.

userText: My Tailwind classes aren't applying, what did I miss?
assistantText: Make sure the content array in tailwind.config.js globs your template files (e.g. ./src/**/*.{ts,tsx}); otherwise Tailwind purges the classes.

userText: How do I clean up a subscription in a React effect?
assistantText: Return a cleanup function from useEffect; React runs it on unmount and before re-running the effect, so unsubscribe there.

userText: What does a Postgres connection string look like?
assistantText: postgresql://USER:PASSWORD@HOST:5432/DBNAME — the same host/port/db you configured in the docker-compose service.

userText: How do I add a Redis container with docker-compose?
assistantText: Add a redis:7 service, expose port 6379, and optionally mount a volume at /data with appendonly yes for persistence.

userText: What dimensionality does the bge-large model produce?
assistantText: BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 produces 1024-dimensional embeddings and is served through the local OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

userText: Does Chroma rank by cosine or L2 distance?
assistantText: Chroma's collection distance defaults to L2, but squirl treats lower scores as more similar; the in-memory eval store uses cosine distance for stable rankings.

userText: Where does vite put the production build?
assistantText: vite build writes to the dist directory by default; squirl overrides it to dist-web for the web bundle via build.outDir.
